| `beqz rs, label` | `beq rs, zero, label` | salta si `rs == 0` |
| `bnez rs, label` | `bne rs, zero, label` | salta si `rs != 0` |
| `bltz rs, label` | `blt rs, zero, label` | salta si `rs < 0` |
| `bgez rs, label` | `bge rs, zero, label` | salta si `rs ≥ 0` |
| `bgtz rs, label` | `blt zero, rs, label` | salta si `rs > 0` |
| `blez rs, label` | `bge zero, rs, label` | salta si `rs ≤ 0` |
